title: Arts, Humanities & Social Sciences
description: Explore the rich world of human expression, society, and culture through arts, humanities, and social sciences.
summary: Arts, Humanities & Social Sciences form the backbone of understanding human civilization. This stream encompasses literature, history, philosophy, psychology, sociology, political science, and languages. Students develop critical thinking, communication, and analytical skills that are increasingly valued in today's knowledge economy. From shaping public policy to creating impactful media content, graduates contribute meaningfully to society's intellectual and cultural fabric.
whoShouldChoose: Interest in Society, Culture & Human Behavior

careers.title: Professor/Lecturer
careers.description: Teaches arts, humanities, or social sciences subjects

careers.title: Journalist
careers.description: Reports on news, culture, or politics

careers.title: Editor
careers.description: Edits books, articles, or media content

careers.title: Social Media Manager
careers.description: Develops content and strategies for online platforms

careers.title: Filmmaker/Director
careers.description: Produces movies, documentaries, or digital media

careers.title: Psychologist
careers.description: Studies human behavior and mental health

careers.title: Human Resources Manager
careers.description: Manages employee relations and company policies

careers.title: Counselor
careers.description: Provides emotional and mental health support

institutes.name: Lady Shri Ram College for Women (LSR)

title: Economics
description: Understand economic trends, policies, and financial systems that shape the world economy.
summary: Economics is the study of how societies allocate scarce resources. It provides insights into market behavior, government policies, international trade, and financial systems. Economists analyze data to forecast trends, evaluate policies, and guide decision-making in both public and private sectors. With globalization and digital transformation, economics graduates are in high demand across banking, consulting, research institutions, and government agencies.
whoShouldChoose: Interest in analyzing economic trends and data

careers.title: Economist
careers.description: Analyzes economic trends and policies for government agencies, private firms, or think tanks

careers.title: Policy Analyst
careers.description: Works with government institutions or NGOs to assess and develop public policies

careers.title: Financial Analyst
careers.description: Evaluates investments, stocks, and financial decisions for businesses

careers.title: Investment Banker
careers.description: Helps companies raise capital and advises on mergers and acquisitions

careers.title: Management Consultant
careers.description: Advises companies on improving efficiency and profitability

careers.title: Statistician
careers.description: Uses economic data to assist in decision-making processes

entranceExams.name: ISI Admission Test
entranceExams.programs: M.S. in Quantitative Economics at ISI Kolkata

entranceExams.name: IGIDR Entrance Test
entranceExams.programs: M.Sc. in Economics at IGIDR Mumbai

title: Mass Communication
description: Learn to create, distribute, and analyze media content across various platforms.
summary: Mass Communication is the study of how information is created, transmitted, and received through various media channels. This field covers journalism, advertising, public relations, film production, and digital media. With the explosion of social media and content platforms, skilled communicators are essential for organizations to engage with audiences effectively. Graduates work in newsrooms, production houses, advertising agencies, and corporate communications.

degrees.name: BJMC (Bachelor of Journalism and Mass Communication)

careers.title: Journalist
careers.description: Reports news and current affairs for various media outlets

careers.title: Content Creator
careers.description: Creates engaging content for digital platforms

careers.title: Public Relations Officer
careers.description: Manages public image and communications for organizations

careers.title: Film Director
careers.description: Directs films, documentaries, and TV shows

careers.title: Anchor/RJ
careers.description: Hosts TV shows or radio programs

title: Commerce, Finance & Management
description: Master the world of business, finance, and management to drive economic growth.
summary: Commerce, Finance & Management provides a comprehensive understanding of business operations, financial markets, and organizational management. Students learn accounting, taxation, financial analysis, and business law. This stream offers diverse career paths from chartered accountancy to corporate finance, making it ideal for those who want to understand how businesses operate and succeed in the competitive corporate world.

careers.title: Chartered Accountant
careers.description: Manages financial records and provides tax advice

careers.title: Investment Banker
careers.description: Advises on capital raising and M&A

careers.title: Tax Consultant
careers.description: Provides tax planning and compliance services

title: Business Management
description: Develop leadership and strategic skills to manage organizations effectively.
summary: Business Management focuses on developing leadership, strategic thinking, and operational skills needed to run organizations effectively. Students learn about marketing, human resources, operations, and strategic planning. With businesses becoming more complex and globalized, skilled managers are essential for organizational success. Graduates can pursue careers in consulting, entrepreneurship, or climb the corporate ladder to executive positions.

careers.title: CEO
careers.description: Oversees overall operations and strategy of a company

careers.title: General Manager
careers.description: Supervises business functions and organizational performance

careers.title: HR Manager
careers.description: Manages hiring, training, and employee relations

careers.title: Marketing Manager
careers.description: Develops marketing strategies and brand awareness

careers.title: Operations Manager
careers.description: Ensures smooth and efficient running of operations

title: Agriculture, Horticulture & Allied Sciences
description: Contribute to food security and sustainable farming through agricultural sciences.
summary: Agriculture, Horticulture & Allied Sciences focus on food production, crop management, and sustainable farming practices. This field is crucial for India's economy and food security. Students learn about soil science, plant genetics, pest management, and agricultural technology. With increasing focus on sustainable agriculture and food technology, this sector offers excellent opportunities in research, agribusiness, and government agricultural services.
whoShouldChoose: Interest in farming and food production

careers.title: Agricultural Scientist
careers.description: Researches crop improvement and farming techniques

careers.title: Agricultural Officer
careers.description: Works with government to implement farming policies

title: Veterinary & Fishery Sciences
description: Care for animals and contribute to animal health and fishery development.
summary: Veterinary & Fishery Sciences focus on animal health, welfare, and the sustainable development of fishery resources. Veterinarians diagnose and treat animal diseases, while fishery scientists work on aquaculture and marine resource management. With growing awareness of animal welfare and the importance of fisheries to the economy, these professions offer meaningful careers combining science with compassion for animals.
whoShouldChoose: Interest in animal health and welfare

title: Architecture & Planning
description: Design sustainable buildings and plan cities for the future.
summary: Architecture & Planning combines creativity with technical expertise to design functional and aesthetically pleasing built environments. Architects create buildings that are safe, sustainable, and beautiful, while urban planners develop comprehensive plans for cities and regions. With rapid urbanization in India, skilled architects and planners are essential for creating livable, sustainable cities that meet the needs of growing populations.

entranceExams.name: JEE Main Paper 2
entranceExams.programs: B.Arch at NITs and other institutes

title: Computer/IT Sciences
description: Build the digital future through software development, AI, and technology innovation.
summary: Computer/IT Sciences is at the forefront of technological innovation, covering software development, data science, artificial intelligence, cybersecurity, and cloud computing. As digital transformation accelerates across all industries, IT professionals are in unprecedented demand. From creating mobile apps to developing AI systems, computer science graduates drive innovation and solve complex problems that shape our digital future.
whoShouldChoose: Interest in innovation and digital solutions

careers.title: Data Scientist
careers.description: Analyzes complex data to derive insights

title: Engineering & Technology
description: Apply science and mathematics to solve real-world problems through engineering.
summary: Engineering & Technology applies scientific principles to design, build, and maintain systems that solve real-world problems. From civil infrastructure to electronic devices, engineers create solutions that improve lives. With India's infrastructure development and technological advancement, engineers are essential across sectors including construction, manufacturing, energy, and technology. This versatile field offers numerous specializations and career paths.
whoShouldChoose: Strong aptitude in Physics and Mathematics

careers.title: Civil Engineer
careers.description: Designs infrastructure like buildings, roads, and bridges

careers.title: Electrical Engineer
careers.description: Works on electrical systems and power generation

entranceExams.name: JEE Main
entranceExams.programs: B.Tech at NITs, IIITs, and CFTIs

title: Medical & Allied Sciences
description: Serve humanity by diagnosing, treating, and preventing diseases.
summary: Medical & Allied Sciences focus on understanding human health, diagnosing diseases, and providing treatment. Doctors, dentists, and AYUSH practitioners play a vital role in healthcare delivery. Medicine is one of the most respected and rewarding professions, offering the opportunity to save lives and improve patient outcomes. With growing healthcare needs and medical tourism in India, qualified medical professionals are always in demand.
whoShouldChoose: Passion for helping and healing people
Strong aptitude in Biology and Chemistry

careers.title: Dentist
careers.description: Treats dental and oral health issues

title: Paramedical & Allied Health Sciences
description: Support healthcare delivery through paramedical and allied health professions.
summary: Paramedical & Allied Health Sciences encompass a wide range of healthcare support professions including pharmacy, physiotherapy, radiology, and laboratory sciences. These professionals work alongside doctors to provide comprehensive patient care. With the expansion of healthcare infrastructure and increased focus on preventive care, paramedical professionals play an increasingly important role in the healthcare ecosystem.

careers.title: Pharmacist
careers.description: Dispenses medications and advises on drug use

careers.title: Physiotherapist
careers.description: Helps patients recover from injuries through therapy

title: Pure Sciences
description: Explore the fundamental principles of nature through physics, chemistry, and biology.
summary: Pure Sciences focus on understanding the fundamental principles of nature through physics, chemistry, mathematics, and biology. Research in pure sciences drives innovation and forms the foundation for applied technologies. Scientists work in research institutions, universities, and R&D departments of companies. With India's growing emphasis on scientific research and innovation, careers in pure sciences offer intellectual satisfaction and contribution to human knowledge.

careers.title: Lab Scientist
careers.description: Works in laboratories for research and testing

title: Therapeutic Health Sciences
description: Promote wellness through therapeutic approaches like yoga, naturopathy, and alternative medicine.
summary: Therapeutic Health Sciences focus on holistic wellness and alternative healing approaches including yoga, naturopathy, and integrative medicine. These practices emphasize prevention and natural healing methods. With increasing awareness of mental health and wellness, therapeutic professionals are in growing demand at wellness centers, hospitals, and corporate wellness programs. This field combines ancient wisdom with modern health science.

title: Design, Fashion & Fine Arts
description: Express creativity through design, fashion, and visual arts.
summary: Design, Fashion & Fine Arts provide creative outlets for artistic expression while building practical skills for commercial applications. From fashion design to graphic design, UI/UX, and traditional fine arts, this field offers diverse career paths. India's growing fashion industry, digital economy, and creative sector create abundant opportunities for talented designers. Graduates work in fashion houses, design studios, advertising agencies, and entertainment companies.

title: Hotel Management & Tourism
description: Build a career in hospitality, tourism, and culinary arts.
summary: Hotel Management & Tourism prepares students for careers in hospitality, tourism, and culinary arts. This industry is one of the largest employers globally, offering opportunities in hotels, restaurants, airlines, cruise ships, and tourism companies. With India being a major tourist destination and the hospitality sector expanding rapidly, skilled professionals who can deliver exceptional guest experiences are highly valued.

careers.title: Chef
careers.description: Prepares food in hotels and restaurants

title: Law
description: Uphold justice and protect rights through legal practice.
summary: Law is a prestigious profession focused on upholding justice, protecting rights, and maintaining social order. Lawyers interpret laws, represent clients, and contribute to the legal framework of society. With increasing corporate activity, international trade, and rights awareness, the demand for legal professionals continues to grow. Law graduates work in courts, corporate legal departments, law firms, and public interest organizations.
whoShouldChoose: Interest in justice and legal systems

title: Defence Forces (NDA)
description: Serve the nation through a career in the armed forces.
summary: Defence Forces offer a career of honor, discipline, and service to the nation. Officers in the Army, Navy, and Air Force lead troops, operate sophisticated equipment, and protect national security. The National Defence Academy provides world-class training combining academics with military skills. A career in defence offers adventure, leadership opportunities, excellent benefits, and the pride of serving the country.
whoShouldChoose: Patriotism and desire to serve the nation

careers.title: Army Officer
careers.description: Leads troops in the Indian Army

careers.title: Air Force Officer
careers.description: Serves in the Indian Air Force

title: Sports, Yoga & Physical Education
description: Build a career around fitness, sports, and physical well-being.
summary: Sports, Yoga & Physical Education focuses on fitness, athletic performance, and physical well-being. This field combines passion for sports with scientific understanding of human physiology. With growing awareness of health and fitness, and India's increasing focus on sports excellence, professionals in this field find opportunities as coaches, trainers, sports scientists, and physical education teachers. The field also includes sports management and sports journalism.

careers.title: Sports Scientist
careers.description: Applies science to improve athletic performance

title: Aviation
description: Take to the skies with a career in aviation and aerospace.
summary: Aviation offers exciting careers in flying, aircraft maintenance, and airport operations. Pilots command aircraft carrying passengers and cargo, while aviation engineers ensure aircraft safety and performance. India's aviation sector is one of the fastest-growing globally, creating demand for skilled professionals. The field combines technical expertise with adventure, offering competitive salaries and opportunities to travel the world.

title: Chartered Accountancy (CA) & Company Secretary (CS)
description: Become a certified professional in accounting or corporate governance.
summary: Chartered Accountancy (CA) and Company Secretary (CS) are prestigious professional qualifications in finance and corporate governance. CAs are experts in accounting, auditing, and taxation, while CS professionals specialize in corporate law and compliance. These qualifications are highly respected in the business world, offering excellent career prospects with high earning potential. Professionals work in audit firms, corporations, and as independent practitioners.
whoShouldChoose: Strong aptitude in accounting and finance
Interest in corporate law and governance

careers.title: Chartered Accountant
careers.description: Manages audits, taxation, and financial advising

title: Nursing
description: Provide compassionate care to patients in healthcare settings.
summary: Nursing is a noble profession focused on providing compassionate care to patients across healthcare settings. Nurses are essential members of healthcare teams, providing direct patient care, administering medications, and supporting recovery. With global demand for qualified nurses and expanding healthcare infrastructure in India, nursing offers stable employment, opportunities for advancement, and the satisfaction of making a difference in patients' lives.

careers.title: Registered Nurse
careers.description: Provides direct patient care in hospitals
